content: Morning. Run a quick health check on prod and show me what monitoring we have active.

Running the local synthetic project health check.

Results from `./scripts/health_check.sh`:
- [OK] Database reachable at db-prod.internal:5432
- [OK] Platform API healthy (HTTP 200)

Active monitoring in `monitoring/alerts.yaml`:
- DatabaseUnreachable -> `runbooks/database_incident.md`
- DatabaseHighConnections -> `runbooks/database_incident.md`
- ServiceDown -> `runbooks/deployment_guide.md`
Pull up the current state of our infra monitoring setup and list the runbooks we have on hand.

Monitoring summary:

| Alert | Severity | Runbook |
|---|---|---|
| DatabaseUnreachable | critical | `database_incident.md` |
| DatabaseHighConnections | warning | `database_incident.md` |
| ServiceDown | critical | `deployment_guide.md` |

Runbooks on hand:
- `project/runbooks/database_incident.md`
- `project/runbooks/deployment_guide.md`
- `project/runbooks/incident_response.md`
I saved the dev environment setup wiki to project/docs/onboarding_wiki.md. Read it and save any workflow conventions for local mock onboarding handoff packets to memory.
